message:
feat(cross_pane_correlation): add operational telemetry counters to CorrelationEngine [ft-3kxe.26]

Add CorrelationEngineTelemetry with 5 counters tracking events ingested,
scans performed, correlations found, prunes executed, and events pruned.
Wire all counter increments into ingest/ingest_batch/scan/prune methods.
Add 16 tests (11 unit + 5 property) validating counter accuracy,
monotonicity, bounds, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
